_sessionContext.initialMessage: Create a goal to make the project-context capability extract and document git commit conventions. The prompt should instruct the analyzer to inspect git history (commit messages, tags, branch patterns) and surface conventions like Conventional Commits, squash-merge titles, signing practices, etc. in PROJECT.md so downstream agents know how to format commits for the target project. This follows the same pattern as the recent test-directory-convention addition (goal: fix-test-directory-structure).
